CustomField.description: Optional org-wide override for Tool Flow Graph generation. Stores the DeveloperName__c of the active LLM configuration to use for graph authoring. Leave blank to fall back to the agent's linked runtime LLM configuration.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional org-wide override for Tool Flow Graph generation. Stores the LLM Configuration Developer Name. Leave blank to use the agent's linked LLM Configuration.
CustomField.label: Tool Flow Gen LLM Config
